final:
module NAT (
    input wire clk,
    input wire enable,
    input wire [31:0] internal_ip,
    input wire [31:0] external_ip,
    output reg [31:0] translated_ip
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (enable) begin
            translated_ip <= external_ip; // Use external IP when enabled
        end
    end
endmodule
